GHOST-KM-PARALLEL-FUTURE describes future, postponed, or evaluation-dependent capability; current executable evidence keeps it out of the active Knowledge Management pipeline rather than assigning a Python owner.

The same active SuperPrompt instance is mutated across Retriever, Reranker, A3NLIGate, A4Condenser and deterministic A4 finalization; super_prompt.py defines the state object but does not alone own the complete mutation-and-return contract.
ragstream/retrieval/retriever.py owns hydration and writes the ordered hydrated Chunk objects into sp.base_context_chunks during retrieval-stage finalization.

Stage-view behavior spans Retriever, Reranker, A3NLIGate and A4 deterministic finalization; super_prompt.py provides the container but does not create the required retrieval, reranked, a3 and a4 outcomes.
final_selection_ids is successively owned by Retrieval, Reranker, A3 and A4 stage implementations; no single Python file owns the complete latest-stage identifier contract.
ragstream/agents/a4_det_processing.py owns successful A4 S_CTX_MD validation and write-back through finalize_a4_output(), while super_prompt.py only declares the field.

Knowledge Management diagnostic extras are written by multiple stage implementations, including Retriever, A3NLIGate and A4 deterministic processing; super_prompt.py does not own their complete semantics.
Lifecycle updates span Retriever, Reranker, A3NLIGate and A4 deterministic finalization; no single Python file owns all Knowledge Management stage/history transitions.
